Release notes for the Pebble EV2-1 firmware, including bootloader and integrity verification files.

# Purpose
The document provides release notes for the Pebble EV2-1 firmware. It describes the contents of an archive that includes the firmware and bootloader files for the Pebble E-Paper Watch. The archive contains five files: a README document, the bootloader file `pebble_ev2-1_boot.hex`, and its corresponding MD5 checksum file `pebble_ev2-1_boot.md5`, as well as the firmware file `pebble_ev2-1_fw.hex` and its MD5 checksum file `pebble_ev2-1_fw.md5`. The MD5 checksum files are used to verify the integrity of the bootloader and firmware files. After loading the bootloader and firmware onto the device, the watch will display a "Pebble" splash screen, followed by a screen prompting the user to connect the watch to a phone. During this time, the watch will not respond to button inputs.
